summary.lv: Back-end inženiera (Golang) loma pie CV-Online Recruitment klienta, kas izstrādā kompleksu digitālu platformu biznesa procesu automatizācijai. Atbildība par backend servisu arhitektūru, integrācijām, MySQL datu plūsmām un cloud-native ekspluatāciju ar augstu uzticamību.
summary.en: Back-end Engineer (Golang) role for an undisclosed CV-Online Recruitment client building a long-term, technically complex platform that automates business processes. Owns backend service architecture, integrations, MySQL data flows, and cloud-native operations with strong reliability expectations.
